name: Bogey's and Beers Golf League
format: 2-man teams. Weekly: 9 holes (alternating front/back). Players earn individual points hole-by-hole based on net score (hole-in-one 5, albatross 4, eagle 3, birdie 2, par 1, bogey 0.5, double 0, triple or worse -0.5) plus a +1 show-up bonus. Each team's two individuals' points are summed; higher team total wins 3 team points (split 1.5/1.5, or all 3 to a solo winner). Subs welcome -- they earn individual points and can earn their playing partner's team points.
